claims.headline: Sharper mental performance
claims.notesSentence: SHR-5 extract improved mental performance under stress in a placebo-controlled trial of students during exam-period stress.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Rhodiola SHR-5 exam-stress trial on PubMed

claims.headline: Lifts mild burnout
claims.notesSentence: A 28-day RCT of SHR-5 in adults with stress-related fatigue reported reductions in burnout-associated symptoms.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Rhodiola SHR-5 stress-fatigue RCT on PubMed
